scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init 'Gestion du budget' com.gestionbudget.app --web-dir dist
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run icons && npm run build && npx cap add android && npx cap sync
